turns.user_message: I noticed I didn't smile at a funny video today. That used to not bother me at all.
I keep noticing how little I react to things I used to love. It's starting to feel like a permanent change.
I feel completely numb to everything that once gave me joy. I'm just an empty shell going through the motions.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves. This used to not bother the speaker.
